mapper.insert: INSERT INTO accommodation_review (user_id, accommodation_id, content, rating, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accommodationId}, #{content}, #{rating}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ar.id, ar.user_id as userId, ar.accommodation_id as accommodationId, ar.content, ar.rating, ar.create_time as createTime, u.username, u.avatar FROM accommodation_review ar LEFT JOIN user u ON ar.user_id = u.id WHERE ar.id = #{id}
